arts.ttl: Milan Secures Gimenez’s Approval, Initiate Talks with Feyenoord; Walker’s Debut Set for Derby
arts.sum: AC Milan have received a positive signal from Santiago Gimenez, and negotiations with Feyenoord are set to begin. The Mexican striker with an Italian passport has expressed his desire to don the red and black jersey, and his entourage is working to make this dream a reality. arts.ttl: Santiago Giménez Emerges as Top Target for AC Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan are widening their search for a new striker for manager Sergio Conceição, with Santiago Giménez from Feyenoord emerging as the primary target. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that after extensive evaluations of Marcus Rashford from Manchester United, the Rossoneri have shifted their focus to the Mexican forward.
